style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with slow-drifting mist particles that twist like smoke, casting distorted reflections on nearby surfaces; cold blue-white energy pulses glow faintly through its translucent form, illuminating the air with an eerie, moonlit luminescence; shadows elongate unnaturally around its limbs, bending in impossible directions as if resisting gravity. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
